# HT Hair Transplant Clinic (besthairlahore.com)

Welcome to the LLM-readable directory for HT Hair Transplant, a premium hair restoration and aesthetic clinic based in DHA, Lahore, Pakistan.

## Core Information
- **Official Domain**: https://www.besthairlahore.com/
- **Brand Name**: HT Hair Transplant
- **Services**: FUE (Follicular Unit Extraction), DHI (Direct Hair Implantation), Exosome Regenerative Therapy, Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) Therapy, Acne Scars Treatment, Botox & Fillers, Laser Hair Removal.
- **Location**: DHA, Lahore, Pakistan (Target areas: Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad).
- **Contact Phone**: +92 300 4610777 (WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923004610777)
- **Email**: info@htaesthetics.com
- **Operating Hours**: Monday–Friday 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM (PKT).

## Site Structure & Pages
- **Home Page** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/index.html): Explains clinical indicators, doctor reviews, why choose cards, and features an interactive before-after slider (FUE 3200 grafts and DHI 2500 grafts).
- **Services** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/services.html): Complete treatments layout with detailed procedures for FUE, DHI, PRP, and skincare.
- **FAQ Hub** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/faqs.html): Conversational Q&A answering graft density, cost queries, pain thresholds, and recovery details.
- **Cost Guide** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/hair-transplant-cost-pakistan.html): Graft-based pricing tables and package comparisons for FUE and DHI in Lahore, Karachi, and Islamabad.
- **About Us** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/about.html): Mission, vision, core doctor records, and clinical accreditations.
- **Contact** (https://www.besthairlahore.com/contact.html): Addresses, direct phone lines, map iframe coordinates, and enquiry forms.

- **Lahore**: https://www.besthairlahore.com/hair-transplant-lahore.html
